NPCI_RULE_UPI_T5.description: Failed UPI transactions where payer is debited must auto-reverse within T+5 business days

NPCI_RULE_UPI_T1.description: If beneficiary bank is at fault, reversal within T+1 business day

NEFT_RULE_BATCH_WINDOW.description: NEFT settles in 48 half-hourly batches per day via Federal Bank, 00:30 to 00:00 IST

NEFT_RULE_ESCALATION_THRESHOLD.description: If more than 2 hours since initiated_at with no settled_at, state that a senior colleague has been notified and will reach out within 2 hours — user does not need to do anything

ESCALATION_RULE_AMOUNT.description: Mandatory escalation if transaction amount exceeds 50000 INR; senior colleague will reach out within category SLA — user does not need to do anything

ESCALATION_RULE_DISTRESS.description: Mandatory escalation if user message contains distress keywords; senior colleague will reach out within SLA on registered contact — user does not need to do anything, never ask for personal info
